'''竏嗔-ng-r-g''' ('''kapangregoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flawter|flawter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flawter|flawter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗔-ng-r-g
|-
! Lemma
| kapangregoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipangregoko|thipangregoko]] || [[word:jipangregoko|jipangregoko]] || [[word:shipangregoko|shipangregoko]] || [[word:kipangregoko|kipangregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupangregoko|thuthupangregoko]] || [[word:jujupangregoko|jujupangregoko]] || [[word:shushupangregoko|shushupangregoko]] || [[word:kukupangregoko|kukupangregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupangregoko|thupangregoko]] || [[word:jupangregoko|jupangregoko]] || [[word:shupangregoko|shupangregoko]] || [[word:kupangregoko|kupangregoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupangregoko|thupangregoko]] || [[word:jupangregoko|jupangregoko]] || [[word:shupangregoko|shupangregoko]] || [[word:kupangregoko|kupangregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepangregoko|thepangregoko]] || [[word:jepangregoko|jepangregoko]] || [[word:shepangregoko|shepangregoko]] || [[word:kepangregoko|kepangregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopangregoko|thothopangregoko]] || [[word:jojopangregoko|jojopangregoko]] || [[word:shoshopangregoko|shoshopangregoko]] || [[word:kokopangregoko|kokopangregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopangregoko|thopangregoko]] || [[word:jopangregoko|jopangregoko]] || [[word:shopangregoko|shopangregoko]] || [[word:kopangregoko|kopangregoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopangregoko|thopangregoko]] || [[word:jopangregoko|jopangregoko]] || [[word:shopangregoko|shopangregoko]] || [[word:kopangregoko|kopangregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦpangregoko|thﾃｦpangregoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦpangregoko|jﾃｦpangregoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦpangregoko|shﾃｦpangregoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦpangregoko|kﾃｦpangregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapangregoko|thathapangregoko]] || [[word:jajapangregoko|jajapangregoko]] || [[word:shashapangregoko|shashapangregoko]] || [[word:kakapangregoko|kakapangregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapangregoko|thapangregoko]] || [[word:japangregoko|japangregoko]] || [[word:shapangregoko|shapangregoko]] || [[word:kapangregoko|kapangregoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapangregoko|thapangregoko]] || [[word:japangregoko|japangregoko]] || [[word:shapangregoko|shapangregoko]] || [[word:kapangregoko|kapangregoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
